name: com.towneh.videoarealight
description: Real-time area-light reflections from a video render texture for Unity URP 17 / Forward+. A bright video screen lights and reflects on glossy surfaces (floors, metal, panels) using an MRP specular approximation plus an analytic polygon irradiance integral. No precomputed lookup tables, no third-party data - MIT licensed.

samples.description: A simple room demonstrating the area light effect on glossy walls and floor.
